overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk, featuring holographic advertising towers, neon-lit skyscrapers, and industrial urban infrastructure. The player character walks along a street lined with palm trees and overhead power lines, passing pedestrians and vehicles in a moody, atmospheric setting from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated city street approaching downtown skyline

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated roadway toward the city center, observing the holographic towers and distant skyline

entered.detail: tall glowing holographic structures displaying advertisements, rising above the skyline
large circular stadium structure with illuminated signage in the distance
dense network of electrical wires crisscrossing between utility poles
palm trees lining the right side of the street
illuminated street lamps with red warning lights on top

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide elevated roadway at dusk, with a clear view of the futuristic city skyline ahead. Holographic advertising towers glow brightly on the right, while an industrial stadium structure dominates the center distance. Power lines crisscross overhead, and palm trees line the sidewalk. The street is initially empty of pedestrians and vehicles, creating a calm, atmospheric introduction to the urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with overhead power infrastructure and parked vehicles

events.description: a car with headlights illuminated drives past from behind and overtakes on the left side of the street
pedestrians begin appearing on the sidewalk, walking in both directions

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street, passing parked vehicles and sharing the sidewalk with pedestrians while observing the cityscape

notable_agents.action: car driving past with headlights on, moving away from camera
pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as camera

entered.detail: vehicles parked along the right curb of the street
tall electrical transmission towers with multiple cross-arms

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along the urban street, now passing parked cars on the right and utility poles on the left. A vehicle overtakes on the left around the 25-second mark, and pedestrians begin appearing on the sidewalk. The holographic towers remain visible but appear closer on the right, while the industrial stadium fades from view behind. The atmosphere remains consistently moody with mixed natural and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: turning left at the street intersection to cross the road
crossing the street alongside other pedestrians while vehicles wait

agents.ego_description: navigating the intersection by turning left and crossing the street with a group of pedestrians, then continuing along the new sidewalk

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street together in the same direction
car waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
low-rise commercial structures at the street corner

segments.scene_description: The final segment begins with the camera approaching a street intersection. Around 48 seconds, the camera turns left and crosses the street alongside a moderate crowd of pedestrians. Vehicles wait at the intersection as the crossing occurs. After crossing, the camera continues along the new sidewalk, with the holographic towers now appearing more distant on the right and power lines shifting to the left side of the frame. The urban environment maintains its cyberpunk aesthetic with mixed lighting and industrial elements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a futuristic urban roadway that transitions from a quiet, wide-open vista into a crowded city intersection. It begins on an elevated street at dusk, moving toward a distant industrial stadium and glowing holographic advertising towers under a web of overhead power lines and palm trees. As the camera advances, the stadium fades from view and the environment becomes more active, with parked cars lining the curb and vehicles and pedestrians beginning to populate the street. The scene then shifts toward a busy intersection where the camera turns left, crossing the road alongside a moderate crowd of people while vehicles wait. Finally, the movement continues along a new sidewalk, leaving the holographic towers behind in the distance as the power lines shift across the frame within the moody, neon-lit cyberpunk landscape.
